# PHBackgroundResourceUploadProcessingResult.processing

**Case**

the extension has only partially completed its processing and still requires more time

## Declaration

```swift
case processing
```

## Processing results

- **PHBackgroundResourceUploadProcessingResult.completed**: the extension has completed all processing required and is up to date with the photos library
- **PHBackgroundResourceUploadProcessingResult.failure**: the extension failed the processing task with an error
